# Princeton Class of 2000

> Official website of the Princeton University Class of 2000, organizing reunions, class activities, and alumni engagement since graduation on June 6, 2000.

The Princeton University Class of 2000 comprises approximately 1,100 graduates. Under the motto "Bid Every Care Withdraw," the class has maintained one of Princeton's most active alumni communities for over 25 years.

## Reunions 2026

- [Home](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/): Class homepage with latest news and reunion information
- [Registration](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/registration/): Register for the 26th Reunion
- [Schedule](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/schedule/): Full reunion event schedule
- [Housing](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/housing/): Reunion housing information and options
- [Kids Programming](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/kids/): Tiger Camp childcare and family activities
- [Jacket](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/jacket/): Reunion jacket design, sizing, and ordering
- [Theme](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/bid-every-care-withdraw/): Reunion theme — "Bid Every Care Withdraw"

## Class Resources

- [Class Notes](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/notes/): Princeton Alumni Weekly class column and classmate profiles
- [Library](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/library/): Published works by Class of 2000 members
- [Gear](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/gear/): Official class merchandise and apparel
- [Dues](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/dues/): Annual class dues — annual, five-year, or lifetime plans

## About

- [Leadership](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/leadership/): Class officers, committee chairs, and volunteers
- [Honorary Classmates](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/honorary-classmates/): Distinguished honorary members
- [Constitution](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/constitution/): Class governing document
- [Crew](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/crew/): Reunion volunteer crew
- [Colophon](https://reunions.princeton2000.org/colophon/): How this site is built
